recommendations.title: The Hurricane Heist
recommendations.overview: Thieves attempt a massive heist against the U.S. Treasury as a Category 5 hurricane approaches one of its Mint facilities.

recommendations.title: The Boy Next Door
recommendations.overview: A recently cheated on married woman falls for a younger man who has moved in next door, but their torrid affair soon takes a dangerous turn.

recommendations.title: The Fast and the Furious

recommendations.title: The Skulls
recommendations.overview: A senior at an Ivy League college, who depends on scholarships and working on the side, gets accepted into the secret society The Skulls. He hopes it betters chances at Harvard but The Skulls is not what he thought and comes at a price.
